description: Fragment of a state document, most likely a report. Reports on the arrival or order for produce "ghalla", of a certain district "bi-ʿamal". The first words of 4 lines are preserved, separated by huge line spacing. Reused for a magical text in Aramaic and Hebrew. AA. ASE. YU.
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
